headline: AI buildout gives tech investors new reasons to watch bond market
summary: Tech giants are depleting cash reserves and raising debt in their ambitious data center buildouts, a dynamic that's forcing investors to watch interest rates.

headline: Europe’s Stocks Are Back in the Lead as Stagflation Risks Ease

headline: Goldman Sachs (GS) Stock After Strong 1‑Year Rally Is The Price Still Justified
summary: Wondering whether Goldman Sachs Group is still reasonably priced after a strong run, or if the stock is already baking in too much optimism about the future. Goldman Sachs Group shares last closed at US$1,096.56, with total returns of 5.9% over 7 days, 18.1% over 30 days, 19.9% year to date, 76.1% over 1 year and 268.1% over 3 years. This track record gives plenty of context for a closer look at value. Recent headlines around Goldman Sachs Group have largely centred on its role in global...
